# Stage 5 — Nulls and significance

```{r stage-05-setup, include=FALSE}
source(file.path("..", "R", "00_atlas_setup.R"))
atlas_env <- require.atlas.checkpoint(4)
```

```{r stage-05}
atlas_env <- run_stage_05_nulls(atlas_env)
assign("atlas_env", atlas_env, envir = .GlobalEnv)
atlas_env$global_null
```
